summary: Completed testing for Notes UI placement, Southeast Asia spots expansion, and Offline Mode. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Notes UI moved from Feed.js to Profile.js (floating bubble above avatar), Southeast Asia spots added (Thailand: 16, Sri Lanka: 24, Philippines: 28), Offline Mode card visible in Settings.
critical_code_review_comments: Notes UI correctly implemented in Profile.js (lines 583-630) with floating bubble above avatar
Feed.js no longer contains Notes section - properly removed
useOfflineMode hook properly implemented with localStorage caching for spots
Settings.js has Offline Mode card with download/clear buttons and data-testid attributes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notes UI is now on Profile.js (Instagram-style floating bubble above avatar). Feed.js no longer has Notes section. Southeast Asia expansion complete with 1447 total spots. Offline Mode hook (useOfflineMode.js) caches spots to localStorage.

notes_ui_placement.profile_page: PASS - '+ Add note' button appears above avatar when no note exists (data-testid='add-note-btn')
notes_ui_placement.note_bubble: PASS - Note bubble appears above avatar when note exists (data-testid='profile-note-bubble')
notes_ui_placement.feed_page: PASS - Notes section removed from Feed.js

notes_api.get_user_note: PASS - GET /api/notes/user/{user_id}?viewer_id={viewer_id} returns note and is_mutual_follower
notes_api.get_notes_feed: PASS - GET /api/notes/feed returns own_note, feed, total_count, mutual_follower_count
notes_api.get_my_note: PASS - GET /api/notes/my-note returns user's active note

southeast_asia_spots.thailand: PASS - 16 spots (Phuket, Kata, Bang Tao, etc.)
southeast_asia_spots.sri_lanka: PASS - 24 spots (Arugam Bay Main Point, Baby Point, Coconut Point, etc.)
southeast_asia_spots.philippines: PASS - 28 spots (La Union, Baler, Siargao, Cloud 9, etc.)

offline_mode.settings_card: PASS - Offline Mode card visible in Settings (data-testid='offline-mode-card')
offline_mode.download_button: PASS - Download for Offline button present (data-testid='download-offline-btn')
